title: Supply Chain Manager - DTDC - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - DTDC - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DTDC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!
